summary: Prolonged diabetes, especially with chronic kidney disease, leaves the feet vulnerable to peripheral vascular and arterial disease, and neglect can end in a referral for amputation. Our protocols aim squarely at preventing that outcome and restoring vascularity.
engagement: Detailed case study of the condition, history, and current treatment
Customized, affordable protocol designed around the individual case
Guided therapy with expert supervision, at home wherever possible
Regular follow-ups until the desired result is achieved

summary: Neglected venous disease progresses to itching, skin disorders, and oozing wounds. We have treated chronic venous ulcers successfully, and every such protocol includes staged wound-healing support.
